data.title: Experts Weigh In: Cathie Wood and Tom Lee Share Bitcoin Forecasts
data.description: Key TakeawaysCathie Wood reaffirms ARK’s $1.5M Bitcoin price forecast, citing improving liquidity conditions.Tom Lee softens his $250K Bitcoin forecast, now giving only a “maybe” for a year-end all-time high.Analysts warn Bitcoin must reclaim $92,000 to restore bullish momentum across the crypto market. Bitcoin price forecasts from Cathie Wood and Tom Lee drew renewed attention this week as improving U.S. liquidity and a potential QE pivot fuel speculation about a year-end crypto market reversal. Cathie Wood: Liquidity Boost Supports ARK’s Long-Term Bitcoin ForecastARK Invest says approximately $70B in liquidity has already returned to markets since the end of the U.S. government shutdown, with another $300B expected in the next six weeks as the Treasury General Account normalizes. ARK argues this shift could ease the liquidity squeeze weighing on both crypto and AI valuations.A major catalyst may arrive in the form of the next FOMC meeting in early December, where, odds are the Fed will cut its rate by 25 basis points.Source: ARK Invest on XARK Invest wrote in an X post that “With liquidity returning, quantitative tightening (QT)[2] ending December 1st, and monetary policy turning supportive, we believe conditions are building for markets to potentially reverse recent drawdowns.” Despite recent volatility, ARK’s Bitcoin price forecast remains unchanged:$1.5M bull case by 2030$300,000 bear caseCathie Wood noted that stablecoin growth has reduced Bitcoin’s safe-haven role, but gold’s price surge has offset that effect, keeping the long-term forecast intact. Macro Shifts May Ease Crypto and AI Liquidity PressureWood reiterated that the current liquidity squeeze suppressing the crypto market is likely temporary. She expects conditions to improve “in the next few weeks,” citing renewed liquidity, supportive policy, and improving sentiment across digital assets.Other analysts echo this view. BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes recently suggested a Bitcoin rally to $250,000 could follow a confirmed shift toward QE. Still, analysts warn that Bitcoin must reclaim $92,000 to restore high-confidence buying pressure and unlock a broader recovery. Tom Lee Softens His $250K Bitcoin ProjectionBitMine chair Tom Lee, known for some of the sector’s most bullish predictions, has dialed back his year-end Bitcoin forecast of $250,000. He now says Bitcoin may only “maybe” reclaim its $125,100 all-time high by year-end.Lee still expects Bitcoin to rise above $100,000, emphasizing that the asset historically makes most of its gains in just 10 trading days per year. In 2024, Bitcoin's 10 strongest days produced 52% returns, while the rest of the year averaged –15%. Outlook: Key Levels and Catalysts to WatchAnalysts identify several pivotal factors for the Bitcoin price outlook:$92,000 resistance: A breakout may trigger bullish momentum across the crypto marketFederal Reserve QE pivot: Increased liquidity could strengthen institutional interestMacro volatility: U.S. economic policy remains a major driver of crypto market sentiment

data.title: Dollar Anticipated to Weaken Amid Economic Slowdown
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Pictet Asset Management strategist Luca Paolini has indicated that the U.S. dollar is expected to face a new wave of weakness next year as economic growth slows, paving the way for further interest rate cuts by the Federal Reserve. Paolini highlighted that the interest rate differential for the dollar is narrowing significantly. He stated, "We anticipate the U.S. economy will become slightly weaker, which will gradually alleviate inflationary pressures." In contrast, economic growth in other parts of the world, particularly Europe and Japan, may improve. Additionally, the dollar remains overvalued. Pictet forecasts that by the end of 2026, the dollar index will decline from its current level of around 99.55 to 95.

data.title: UK Chancellor's Autumn Statement Maintains Cryptocurrency Tax Rates
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, UK Chancellor Reeves announced in the Autumn Fiscal Statement on Wednesday that there will be no further increase in the capital gains tax rate, which had already impacted cryptocurrency investors last year. Azariah Nukajam, Gemini's UK Compliance Director, welcomed this decision, stating, "It's encouraging to see that cryptocurrencies won't be subject to new taxes, indicating they are being treated equally with other asset classes, ensuring their long-term viability as an alternative investment option."

Nukajam also noted that recent legislative and regulatory announcements in the UK, along with this budget statement, suggest that "stricter regulations and tax transparency requirements, closer to the 'traditional finance' model, will proceed as planned."

data.title: Institutions predict the dollar may fall in 2026 due to a Federal Reserve rate cut.
data.description: Pictet Asset Management strategist Luca Paolini stated that the dollar will face renewed weakness next year as slower economic growth paves the way for further interest rate cuts by the Federal Reserve. He noted that the dollar's interest rate differential is narrowing significantly. "We expect the US economy to weaken slightly, which will gradually alleviate inflationary pressures." In contrast, economic growth in other parts of the world is likely to improve, particularly in Europe and Japan. Furthermore, the dollar's valuation remains relatively high. Pictet predicts that the dollar index will fall from its current level of around 99.55 to 95 by the end of 2026. (Jinshi)

data.title: Blockrise Secures License Under MiCAR to Expand Services Across Europe
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Dutch Bitcoin asset management firm Blockrise has received a license from the Netherlands Authority for the Financial Markets (AFM) under the new European crypto asset market regulation (MiCAR). This approval allows Blockrise to continue offering financial services in the Netherlands and aims to expand its operations throughout Europe. Additionally, Blockrise plans to introduce a new Bitcoin-backed loan service to all corporate clients this week, with commercial loans starting at 20,000 euros.

Earlier this year, Blockrise secured 2 million euros in seed funding from a consortium of venture capital firms and angel investors. This marks the company's first external funding round, intended to drive business growth. With the MiCAR authorization, Blockrise is preparing for a Series A funding round, aiming to raise 15 million euros.

data.title: Altcoin News Today: Significant Gainers ORCA, SUPER, GLM Surge on Bullish Catalysts
data.description: Key TakeawaysORCA price jumps 31% amid a short squeeze and bullish technical breakoutSUPER rallies 29% driven by airdrop demand, gaming partnerships, and rising trading volumeGLM gains 16% as Arkiv launch boosts decentralized AI/data utility ORCA Jumps on Short Squeeze and Technical BreakoutORCA price climbed 31.64% in 24 hours as a short squeeze forced traders to unwind bearish positions tied to fallout from a recent CEX hack fallout. Negative funding rates and open interest hitting $22.7M signaled overcrowded shorts, triggering rapid forced liquidations and a 4,960% surge in trading volume.On the technical front, ORCA broke above a falling wedge pattern, confirming bullish momentum. Indicators strengthened, with RSI at 67.72 and a MACD bullish crossover. The token now faces resistance at $1.96. A close above this level could target $2.20, while a dip below $1.47 risks renewed selling pressure.  SUPER Surges on Airdrop Speculation SuperVerse (SUPER) price rose 29%, outperforming the crypto market as airdrop-driven demand accelerated. SUPER is a reward token in TON Station’s $3.75M Season 2 campaign, lifting participation and contributing to a 2,047% spike in 24h trading volume.On the technical front, SUPER broke above its 30-day SMA ($0.285) and 7-day EMA ($0.214). Although RSI climbed from 28.67 to 31.04, the token remains vulnerable after a −32.59% 30-day decline. The next resistance sits at $0.355. GLM Rallies on Arkiv Launch and Technical StrengthGLM price increased 16% after breaking above the 23.6% Fibonacci level ($0.2455) with strong buying pressure. Its 30-day SMA ($0.207) now acts as support, and RSI at 54.85 leaves room for upside before overbought conditions. A sustained close above $0.270 could target $0.299.Momentum also came from the launch of Arkiv, a decentralized data layer using GLM for payments and incentives. The release addresses rising demand for censorship-resistant AI/data infrastructure, especially after recent global cloud service outages. Altcoin Outlook: Levels to Watch NextORCA: Can price sustain above $1.96 resistance without a pullback?SUPER: Will volume remain elevated after airdrop hype cools?GLM: Can Arkiv mainnet usage validate valuations post-Devconnect?
